title: NullPointerException in user profile endpoint
description: When a user with no avatar set visits /api/profile, the server returns a 500 error. Expected behavior: return a default avatar URL instead of crashing.
expected_root_cause: missing null check avatar field default value

title: Discount calculation off by one cent on orders over $100
description: Customers report that a 10% discount on a $100.00 order yields $89.99 instead of $90.00. The rounding logic in the pricing module truncates instead of rounding half-up.
expected_root_cause: rounding truncation float precision discount calculation

title: Email notifications not sent after password reset
description: After a successful password reset via /auth/reset, the confirmation email is never delivered. Logs show the email task is enqueued but the template lookup fails silently.
expected_root_cause: template lookup silent failure email notification password reset
